title: rumex acetosella subsp. acetosella
intro: Rumex acetosella subsp. acetosella, also known as sheep's sorrel, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Polygonaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of oxalic acid, which has been used to treat various health issues. The plant offers several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antioxidant, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Sheep's sorrel can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being.
